message.content:
This section provides statistical insights into 2025 global mobile game marketing trends, structured to answer retrieval queries on category performance, ad volume benchmarks, and market share shifts.
• **Topics & Entities:** Mobile game advertising/marketing, ad creative placement, game genres (RPG, Strategy, Casino/Entertainment, Casual, Puzzle, Simulation, Action, Arcade, Adventure, Card, Board, Text), data provider (广大大).
• **Dates:** January–December 2025 (with implied year-over-year comparisons to 2024).
• **Key Claims & Metrics:** RPG products lead in advertising volume with an average of 801 creatives per product annually; Strategy ranks second at 728. The Casino/Entertainment category experienced the most significant growth, with advertiser share reaching 47% (+22.7% YoY) and creative share at 22.3% (+13.9% YoY). Full ranked metrics for advertiser share, creative share, and average annual creatives across 10+ categories are provided.
• **Tables & Figures:** Two data tables detailing category-wise advertiser share (%) and creative share (%) with corresponding YoY percentage changes. One ranked list/chart displaying the 2025 average annual creative count per game category.
• **Evidence Types:** Backend scraped statistical data, comparative YoY analysis, ranked categorical distributions.
• **Retrieval Questions Answered:** Which mobile game categories had the highest ad creative volume in 2025? How did the Casino/Entertainment category’s advertiser and creative shares change year-over-year? What are the exact market share percentages and YoY shifts for each mobile game genre in 2025? What is the data source and reporting timeframe for these mobile game marketing metrics?

   - *Dates:* 2025 (specifically Jan-Dec 2025), YoY comparisons implied (vs. 2024).
   - *Claims:* RPG has the highest ad creative volume (>800 avg). Casino/Entertainment category saw a significant surge in both advertiser share and creative share. Strategy is second in creative volume.
   - *Tables/Figures:* Two tables (Advertiser Share by Category & YoY Change; Creative Share by Category & YoY Change). One figure/chart (Average Annual Creatives by Category in 2025).

Full ranked metrics for advertiser share, creative share, and average annual creatives across 10+ categories are provided.
• **Tables & Figures:** Two data tables detailing category-wise advertiser share (%) and creative share (%) with corresponding YoY percentage changes. One ranked list/chart displaying the 2025 average annual creative count per game category.
